title: Existence of an Infinite Number of Solutions to a Singular Superlinear p-Laplacian Equation on Exterior Domains
comment:
Submitted to a journal for publication. arXiv admin note: substantial
  text overlap with arXiv:2507.17863
summary:
In this paper, we prove the existence of an infinite number of radial
solutions of the $p$-$Laplacian$ equation $\Delta_p u + K(|x|) f(u) =0$ on the
exterior of the ball of radius $R>0$ in ${\mathbb R}^{N}$ such that $u(|x|)\to
0$ as $|x|\to \infty$ where $f$ grows superlinearly at infinity and is singular
at $0$ with $f(u) \sim -\frac{1}{|u|^{m-1}u}$ and $0<m<1$ for small $u$. We
also assume $K(|x|) \sim |x|^{-\alpha}$ for large $|x|$ where $N +
\frac{m(N-p)}{p-1}< \alpha<2(N-1).$

AI.tldr: 证明了p-Laplacian方程在外部区域上存在无穷多个径向解，其中非线性项在无穷远处超线性增长且在原点具有奇异性
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异性和超线性增长的非线性p-Laplacian方程在外部区域上的径向解存在性问题，特别关注解在无穷远处的衰减行为
AI.techniques: 使用相平面分析、能量方法、拓扑度理论（可能涉及Leray-Schauder度）和径向对称性约化技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在给定条件下，p-Laplacian方程在外部区域上存在无穷多个径向解，满足u(|x|)→0当|x|→∞
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异非线性椭圆方程解的存在性理论，为具有奇异性和外部区域条件的p-Laplacian方程提供了新的存在性结果

title: A connection between quantum dot Dirac operators and $\overline\partial$-Robin Laplacians in the context of shape optimization problems
summary:
This work addresses Faber-Krahn-type inequalities for quantum dot Dirac
operators with nonnegative mass on bounded domains in $\mathbb{R}^2$. We show
that this family of inequalities is equivalent to a family of Faber-Krahn-type
inequalities for $\overline\partial$-Robin Laplacians. Thanks to this, we prove
them in the case of simply connected domains for quantum dot boundary
conditions asymptotically close to zigzag boundary conditions. Finally, we also
study the case of negative mass.

AI.tldr: 证明了量子点狄拉克算子在二维有界域上的Faber-Krahn型不等式，并建立了其与∂̅-Robin拉普拉斯算子不等式的等价性
AI.motivation: 研究量子点狄拉克算子在二维有界域上的谱性质，特别是Faber-Krahn型不等式，这类不等式将算子的最小特征值与几何域联系起来，在量子物理和材料科学中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 通过等价性变换将量子点狄拉克算子的谱问题转化为∂̅-Robin拉普拉斯算子的谱问题，利用复分析方法和边界条件渐近分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了量子点狄拉克算子与∂̅-Robin拉普拉斯算子的Faber-Krahn型不等式的等价性；2) 在单连通域上证明了量子点边界条件渐近接近zigzag边界条件时的不等式；3) 研究了负质量情况下的相应结果
AI.significance: 为狄拉克算子的谱几何理论提供了新工具，建立了狄拉克算子与复分析中∂̅算子的深刻联系，对理解石墨烯等二维材料的量子限制效应有重要意义

title: Variational principles on the space of Lorenz curves: Gradient structures and isometries inspired by Wasserstein geometry
summary:
We motivate and derive novel Riemannian gradient structures on the space of
Lorenz curves, which preserve infinite-dimensional variational principles
inherited from Fokker-Planck equations via the lens of Wasserstein geometry and
its variants. We also prove isometry results between corresponding formal
manifolds of probability measures and Lorenz curves, which suggest meaningful
metrics on the space of Lorenz curves when an underlying kinetic premise is
present. In so doing, elegant variational principles are imbued upon highly
nonlinear and nonlocal integro-differential evolution equations resulting from
a recently derived variable transformation of McKean-Vlasov Fokker-Planck
equations.

AI.tldr: 论文在Lorenz曲线空间上构建了新颖的黎曼梯度结构，将Fokker-Planck方程的变分原理通过Wasserstein几何转移到Lorenz曲线空间。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于将概率测度空间上的Wasserstein几何结构推广到Lorenz曲线空间，为非线性非局部积分-微分演化方程提供优雅的变分原理框架。
AI.techniques: 主要使用Wasserstein几何及其变体、黎曼梯度结构、等距映射理论，以及McKean-Vlasov Fokker-Planck方程的变量变换技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在Lorenz曲线空间上推导出新颖的黎曼梯度结构；2. 证明概率测度形式流形与Lorenz曲线之间的等距关系；3. 为非线性非局部积分-微分演化方程建立变分原理。
AI.significance: 该工作将最优输运理论扩展到经济学和统计学中的Lorenz曲线空间，为研究收入分布演化等社会经济问题提供了严格的数学框架，连接了概率论、几何分析和偏微分方程理论。

title: Relaxation of variational problems in the space of functions with bounded $\mathcal{B}$-variation: interaction with measures and lack of concentration phenomena
summary:
We prove an integral representation result for variational functionals in the
space $BV^{\mathcal{B}}$ of functions with bounded $\mathcal{B}$-variation
where $\mathcal{B}$ denotes a $k$-th order, $\mathbb{C}$-elliptic, linear
homogeneous differential operator. This result has been used as a key tool to
get an explicit representation of relaxed energies with linear growth which
lead to limiting generic measures. According to the space dimension and the
order of the operator, concentration phenomena appear and an explicit
interaction is featured. These results are complemented also with Sobolev-type
counterparts. As a further application, a lower semicontinuity result in the
space of fields with $p(\cdot)$-bounded $\mathcal{B}$-variation has also been
obtained.

AI.tldr: 证明了BV^B空间中变分泛函的积分表示定理，并应用于松弛能量表示和下半连续性结果
AI.motivation: 研究具有有界B-变异的函数空间BV^B中的变分泛函表示问题，其中B是k阶C-椭圆线性齐次微分算子，旨在建立积分表示理论并应用于松弛能量和下半连续性分析
AI.techniques: 使用变分法、测度论、椭圆算子理论，结合空间维度和算子阶数分析集中现象，建立积分表示公式和Sobolev型对应结果
AI.main_theorems: 1. BV^B空间中变分泛函的积分表示定理；2. 线性增长松弛能量的显式表示；3. 根据空间维度和算子阶数描述的集中现象；4. p(·)-有界B-变异场空间中的下半连续性结果
AI.significance: 为高阶椭圆算子的变分问题提供了系统的积分表示理论，建立了BV^B空间与松弛能量之间的联系，为变分法、测度理论和偏微分方程正则性理论提供了新工具

title: Gaussian estimates for fundamental solutions of higher-order parabolic equations with time-independent coefficients
summary:
We study the De Giorgi-Moser-Nash estimates of higher-order parabolic
equations in divergence form with complex-valued, measurable, bounded,
uniformly elliptic (in the sense of G$\mathring{a}$rding inequality) and
time-independent coefficients. We also obtain Gaussian upper bounds and
H\"{o}lder regularity estimates for the fundamental solutions of this class of
parabolic equations.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了高阶抛物型方程在复系数、可测、有界、一致椭圆且时间无关系数条件下的De Giorgi-Moser-Nash估计，并获得了基本解的高斯上界和Hölder正则性估计。
AI.motivation: 研究高阶抛物型方程在非光滑系数条件下的正则性理论，特别是当系数为复值、可测、有界、满足Gårding不等式意义下的一致椭圆性且时间无关时，建立De Giorgi-Moser-Nash型估计和基本解的定量性质。
AI.techniques: 使用抛物型方程的De Giorgi-Moser-Nash方法，结合Gårding不等式处理复系数情形，通过能量估计、迭代技术、Campanato空间方法等建立正则性估计和高斯界。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 高阶抛物型方程的De Giorgi-Moser-Nash估计；2. 基本解的高斯上界估计；3. 基本解的Hölder连续性估计。
AI.significance: 将经典De Giorgi-Moser-Nash理论推广到高阶抛物型方程和复系数情形，为研究非光滑系数抛物型方程的正则性理论提供重要工具，在数学物理和偏微分方程理论中有广泛应用价值。

title: Bayesian Inverse Problems on Metric Graphs
summary:
This paper studies the formulation, well-posedness, and numerical solution of
Bayesian inverse problems on metric graphs, in which the edges represent
one-dimensional wires connecting vertices. We focus on the inverse problem of
recovering the diffusion coefficient of a (fractional) elliptic equation on a
metric graph from noisy measurements of the solution. Well-posedness hinges on
both stability of the forward model and an appropriate choice of prior. We
establish the stability of elliptic and fractional elliptic forward models
using recent regularity theory for differential equations on metric graphs. For
the prior, we leverage modern Gaussian Whittle--Mat\'ern process models on
metric graphs with sufficiently smooth sample paths. Numerical results
demonstrate accurate reconstruction and effective uncertainty quantification.

AI.tldr: 在度量图上建立贝叶斯反问题的适定性理论，用于从噪声测量中恢复扩散系数
AI.motivation: 研究度量图上的贝叶斯反问题，其中边表示连接顶点的一维导线，关注从含噪声解测量中恢复（分数阶）椭圆方程的扩散系数
AI.techniques: 利用度量图上微分方程的正则性理论建立前向模型的稳定性；采用具有足够光滑样本路径的度量图上现代高斯Whittle-Matérn过程作为先验分布
AI.main_theorems: 建立了椭圆和分数阶椭圆前向模型的稳定性；证明了在适当先验选择下贝叶斯反问题的适定性；数值结果展示了准确重构和有效的不确定性量化
AI.significance: 为度量图上的反问题提供了严格的数学框架，结合了正则性理论和现代高斯过程先验，在不确定性量化方面具有重要应用价值

title: On the convergence of PINNs for inverse source problem in the complex Ginzburg-Landau equation
summary:
This paper addresses the problem of recovering the spatial profile of the
source in the complex Ginzburg-Landau equation from regional observation data
at fixed times. We establish two types of sufficient measurements for the
unique solvability of the inverse problem. The first is to determine the source
term by using whole data at one fixed instant. Conditional stability is
established by using the eigenfunction expansion argument. Next, using the
analytic continuation method, both uniqueness and a stability estimate for
recovering the unknown source can be established from local data at two
instants. Finally, algorithms based on the physics-informed neural networks
(PINNs) are proposed, and several numerical experiments are presented to show
the accuracy and efficiency of the algorithm.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了从区域观测数据中恢复复Ginzburg-Landau方程源项空间分布的反问题，建立了两种唯一可解性条件并提出了基于物理信息神经网络的数值算法。
AI.motivation: 研究复Ginzburg-Landau方程中源项恢复的反问题，该方程在非线性波传播、超导和模式形成等领域有广泛应用。核心问题是从固定时刻的区域观测数据中确定源项的空间分布。
AI.techniques: 使用特征函数展开法建立条件稳定性，利用解析延拓方法处理局部数据，并采用物理信息神经网络（PINNs）进行数值求解。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了两种充分测量条件：1）利用单一时刻全局数据确定源项的条件稳定性；2）利用两个时刻局部数据恢复未知源项的唯一性和稳定性估计。
AI.significance: 为复Ginzburg-Landau方程的反问题提供了理论保证和实用算法，对非线性偏微分方程的参数识别和逆问题研究有重要贡献，特别是在物理建模和实验数据反演方面。

title: A priori Hölder estimates for equations degenerating on nodal sets
comment:
27 pages, 1 figure. This paper was originally part of the paper "A
  priori regularity estimates for equations degenerating on nodal sets",
  arXiv:2404.06980
summary:
We prove a priori H\"older bounds for continuous solutions to degenerate
equations with variable coefficients of type $$ \mathrm{div}\left(u^2 A\nabla
w\right)=0\quad\mathrm{in \ }\Omega\subset\mathbb R^n,\qquad \mbox{with}\qquad
\mathrm{div}\left(A\nabla u\right)=0, $$ where $A$ is a Lipschitz continuous,
uniformly elliptic matrix (possibly $u$ has non-trivial singular nodal set).
Such estimates are uniform with respect to $u$ in a class of normalized
solutions that have a bounded Almgren frequency. As a consequence, a boundary
Harnack principle holds for the quotient of two solutions vanishing on a common
set.
  This analysis relies on a detailed study of the associated weighted Sobolev
spaces, including integrability of the weight, capacitary properties of the
nodal set, and uniform Sobolev inequalities yielding local boundedness of
solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有可变系数的退化方程连续解的Hölder先验估计，并推导出边界Harnack原理
AI.motivation: 研究退化椭圆方程div(u²A∇w)=0的解的正则性，其中u满足div(A∇u)=0，这类方程出现在自由边界问题、几何分析和物理模型中，特别关注当u有非平凡零点集时的奇异性
AI.techniques: 使用Almgren频率函数、加权Sobolev空间理论、容量方法分析零点集、一致Sobolev不等式、边界Harnack原理
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在Almgren频率有界的归一化解类中，获得与u无关的一致Hölder先验估计；2) 对于在公共集上为零的两个解的商，建立了边界Harnack原理
AI.significance: 为具有奇异权重的退化椭圆方程提供了统一的正则性理论，在自由边界问题、几何分析和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用，特别是处理解的零点集附近的奇异性

title: Counterexample to the second eigenfunction having one zero for a non-local Schrodinger operator
summary:
We demonstrate that the second eigenfunction of a perturbed fractional
Laplace operator on a bounded interval can exhibit two sign changes, in stark
contrast with the classical expectation that it should have exactly one zero.
Our construction employs the Kato-Rellich regular perturbation theory to
analyse an infinite potential well eigenvalue problem, and then uses an
energy-minimisation argument to extend this counterexample to finite potential
wells. Although our detailed analysis focuses on the case where s takes value
1/2 (the Cauchy process), our approach strongly suggests that similar phenomena
occur for other rational values of s in (0, 1). At the time of writing, this
result provides one of the first rigorous insights into the qualitative
behaviour of eigenfunctions for perturbed nonlocal Schrodinger operators.

AI.tldr: 证明了扰动分数阶拉普拉斯算子的第二特征函数在有限区间上可以有两个变号点，打破了经典理论中第二特征函数只有一个零点的预期。
AI.motivation: 研究扰动分数阶拉普拉斯算子的特征函数定性行为，挑战经典局部算子理论中第二特征函数只有一个零点的预期，探索非局部算子的独特性质。
AI.techniques: 使用Kato-Rellich正则扰动理论分析无限势阱特征值问题，结合能量最小化论证将结果推广到有限势阱；主要针对s=1/2（柯西过程）情况，但方法可推广到其他有理s值。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了扰动分数阶拉普拉斯算子的第二特征函数可以在有界区间上出现两个变号点，这是对经典局部算子理论的显著偏离，为非局部薛定谔算子的特征函数行为提供了首个严格洞察。
AI.significance: 首次严格揭示了扰动非局部薛定谔算子特征函数的非经典行为，为理解非局部算子的谱理论和特征函数定性性质提供了重要突破，对分数阶PDE理论有基础性贡献。

title: Modulus of continuity for solutions of non-local heat equations
summary:
We extend the method of modulus of continuity for solutions of parabolic
equations--as used, for instance, to prove the Fundamental Gap Conjecture--to
solutions of non-local heat equations on R^n and in dimension one with a
non-local Neumann boundary condition. Specifically, we show that if a solution
of a non-local heat equation has an initial modulus of continuity satisfying
simple criteria, then this modulus of continuity is preserved at all subsequent
times. In the process of trying to generalise our result in one dimension, we
found a counterexample suggesting that a non-local analogue of the
Payne-Weinberger inequality would depend on more than the diameter of a bounded
(convex) domain.

AI.tldr: 将连续性模方法从局部抛物方程推广到非局部热方程，建立了非局部热方程解的连续性模保持性质
AI.motivation: 连续性模方法在局部抛物方程中已被成功应用（如证明基本间隙猜想），但该方法在非局部方程中的适用性尚不清楚。本文旨在将这一强大工具扩展到非局部热方程，包括全空间R^n和一维带非局部Neumann边界条件的情形。
AI.techniques: 连续性模方法、非局部算子理论、比较原理、最大值原理的推广、非局部边界条件处理、反例构造
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了非局部热方程解的连续性模保持性质：若初值满足特定条件的连续性模，则该模在所有后续时间保持不变。2. 在一维情形下尝试推广时发现反例，表明非局部Payne-Weinberger不等式的形式比局部情形更复杂，不仅依赖于有界凸区域的直径。
AI.significance: 将连续性模这一经典工具扩展到非局部方程，为非局部抛物方程的正则性理论和长时间行为分析提供了新方法。反例的发现揭示了非局部几何与局部几何的本质差异，对非局部泛函不等式理论有重要启示。

title: Stability of laminar monotone shear flows in a channel for high Reynolds number
summary:
We consider the stability of a laminar flow $U\in C^4([-1,1])$ in the
two-dimensional channel $\mathbb{R} \times[-1,1]$ in the large Reynolds number
limit. Assuming that $U$ is strictly monotone but allowing $U^{\prime\prime}$
to vanish, we obtain that if the operator
  $$
  {\mathcal K}_{\nu}=-\frac{d^2}{dx^2}+\frac{U^{\prime\prime}}{U-\nu} \,, $$ is
strictly positive for all $\nu\in\mathbb{R}$ for which
$U^{\prime\prime}(U^{-1}(\nu))=0$,then $U$ is stable for sufficiently large
Reynolds number. This contribution generalizes previous results mostly by
allowing long wave perturbations (but much shorter than the Reynolds number).

AI.tldr: 建立了在允许U''为零的情况下，二维通道中单调层流在大雷诺数下的稳定性判据
AI.motivation: 研究二维通道中单调层流在大雷诺数极限下的稳定性问题，特别是允许U''（速度剖面的二阶导数）为零的情况，这推广了先前的研究结果
AI.techniques: 使用算子理论方法，定义并分析关键算子K_ν，结合渐近分析和谱理论，处理长波扰动但比雷诺数短的扰动模式
AI.main_theorems: 如果对于所有满足U''(U^{-1}(ν))=0的ν∈ℝ，算子K_ν = -d²/dx² + U''/(U-ν)严格正定，则对于充分大的雷诺数，层流U是稳定的
AI.significance: 推广了先前关于层流稳定性的结果，允许更一般的速度剖面（U''可为零），为高雷诺数流动稳定性理论提供了更普适的判据

title: Scattering theory of the nonlinear wave equations on lattices
summary:
In this paper, I will summarize the uniform decay estimates of the discrete
wave equations (DW) established by the oscillatory integral theory in [Sch98,
BCH23, BCH24], and combine the abstract framework of the scattering theory of
the dispersive equations established in [Str81] to finally establish the
scattering theory of the discrete nonlinear wave equations (DNLW), including
the existence of the wave operators and the asymptotic completeness. In
addition, I will establish the scattering theory again by the Strichartz
estimate.

AI.tldr: 建立了离散非线性波动方程的散射理论，包括波算子的存在性和渐近完备性
AI.motivation: 研究离散波动方程（DW）的散射理论，结合振荡积分理论和抽象散射理论框架，解决离散非线性波动方程（DNLW）的散射问题
AI.techniques: 振荡积分理论、抽象散射理论框架、Strichartz估计、离散波动方程的一致衰减估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 基于振荡积分理论建立离散波动方程的一致衰减估计；2. 结合抽象散射理论框架建立离散非线性波动方程的散射理论（波算子存在性和渐近完备性）；3. 使用Strichartz估计重新建立散射理论
AI.significance: 为离散非线性波动方程建立了完整的散射理论框架，将连续情形的散射理论推广到离散情形，为数值分析和计算数学提供理论基础

title: On polarization interface conditions for time-harmonic Maxwell's equations
summary:
We consider the time-harmonic Maxwell's equations with a polarization
interface condition. The interface condition demands that one component of the
electric field vanishes at the interface and that the corresponding component
of the magnetic field has no jump across the interface. These conditions have
been derived in the literature as a homogenization limit for thin wire
inclusion. We analyze the limit equations and provide an existence result and a
Fredholm-alternative.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了具有极化界面条件的时谐Maxwell方程组，建立了存在性结果和Fredholm替代定理
AI.motivation: 研究背景源于细线夹杂物均匀化极限中出现的极化界面条件，该条件要求电场的一个分量在界面处为零，而磁场的对应分量在界面处连续
AI.techniques: 使用时谐Maxwell方程组的分析技术，处理非标准界面条件，应用Fredholm理论
AI.main_theorems: 建立了极限方程的存在性结果和Fredholm替代定理，为这类界面条件提供了完整的适定性分析
AI.significance: 为细线夹杂物均匀化极限中的Maxwell方程组提供了严格的数学基础，对电磁波在复杂介质中的传播问题有重要理论意义

title: Infinite Dimensional Mean-Field Belavkin Equation: Well-posedness and Derivation
summary:
We analyze the mean-field limit of a stochastic Schr{\"o}dinger equation
arising in quantum optimal control and mean-field games, where N interacting
particles undergo continuous indirect measurement. For the open quantum system
described by Belavkin's filtering equation, we derive a mean-field
approximation under minimal assumptions, extending prior results limited to
bounded operators and finitedimensional settings. By establishing global
well-posedness via fixed-point methods-avoiding measure-change techniques-we
obtain higher regularity solutions. Furthermore, we prove rigorous convergence
to the mean-field limit in an infinitedimensional framework. Our work provides
the first derivation of such limits for wave functions in $L^2 (R^d)$, with
implications for simulating and controlling large quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次在无限维框架下推导了量子最优控制和平均场博弈中随机薛定谔方程的平均场极限，适用于L^2(R^d)波函数。
AI.motivation: 研究量子最优控制和平均场博弈中N个相互作用的量子粒子在连续间接测量下的随机薛定谔方程的平均场极限问题，解决现有结果仅限于有界算子和有限维情况的局限性。
AI.techniques: 使用不动点方法建立全局适定性（避免测度变换技术），获得更高正则性的解，并在无限维框架下严格证明收敛到平均场极限。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在最小假设下推导出Belavkin滤波方程的平均场近似；2. 通过不动点方法建立全局适定性并获得高正则性解；3. 在无限维框架下严格证明收敛到平均场极限。
AI.significance: 首次为L^2(R^d)波函数推导出此类平均场极限，为模拟和控制大型量子系统提供了理论基础，扩展了量子最优控制和平均场博弈的数学框架。

title: A Wave-type Model for Age- and Space-structured Epidemics
summary:
We introduce a novel approach of epidemic modeling by combining
age-structured models with damped wave equations. This transforms the
parabolic-type reaction-diffusion model into a hyperbolic system that shares
many properties with a wave or telegrapher's equation. After we establish the
existence of a weak solution of the resulting partial differential equation by
means of characteristics, we show that the solutions to the new model converge
to a solution of the standard age-dependent reaction-diffusion equation when we
let the wave parameter become arbitrarily small. We conclude with a numerical
example to illustrate the behavior of the new model and to further support our
findings.

AI.tldr: 将年龄结构模型与阻尼波动方程结合，提出新型流行病建模方法，将抛物型反应扩散模型转化为双曲系统
AI.motivation: 传统年龄结构流行病模型通常采用抛物型反应扩散方程，本文旨在通过引入波动方程元素，建立更符合实际传播动力学的双曲型模型
AI.techniques: 特征线方法建立弱解存在性，渐近分析证明当波动参数趋于零时收敛到标准年龄依赖反应扩散方程
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过特征线法证明所得偏微分方程弱解存在性；2. 当波动参数趋于零时，新模型解收敛于标准年龄依赖反应扩散方程解
AI.significance: 为流行病建模提供新的双曲型框架，能更好地描述传播波前和有限传播速度，同时保持与传统模型的数学一致性

title: Vanishing viscosity non-unique solutions to the forced 2D Euler Equations
summary:
The forced 2D Euler equations exhibit non-unique solutions with vorticity in
$L^p$, $p > 1$, whereas the corresponding Navier-Stokes solutions are unique.
We investigate whether the inviscid limit $\nu \to 0^+$ from the forced 2D
Navier-Stokes to Euler equations is a selection principle capable of
"resolving" the non-uniqueness. We focus on solutions in a neighborhood of the
non-uniqueness scenario discovered by Vishik; specifically, we incorporate
viscosity $\nu$ and consider $O(\varepsilon)$ size perturbations of the initial
datum. We discover a uniqueness threshold $\varepsilon \sim \nu^{\kappa_{\rm
c}}$, below which the vanishing viscosity solution is unique and radial, and at
which there are viscous solutions converging to non-unique, non-radial
solutions.

AI.tldr: 发现了二维Euler方程非唯一性解与Navier-Stokes方程唯一性解之间的粘性极限选择机制，确定了唯一性阈值ε∼ν^κ_c
AI.motivation: 研究二维强迫Euler方程在L^p空间(p>1)存在非唯一解，而对应Navier-Stokes方程解唯一的矛盾现象，探讨粘性极限ν→0+是否可作为选择机制"解决"非唯一性问题
AI.techniques: 粘性扰动分析、尺度分析、阈值确定方法、Vishik非唯一性场景的邻域研究、径向对称性分析
AI.main_theorems: 发现唯一性阈值ε∼ν^κ_c：当初始扰动幅度ε小于此阈值时，粘性消失解唯一且径向对称；当ε达到此阈值时，存在粘性解收敛到非唯一、非径向的Euler解
AI.significance: 为理解Euler方程非唯一性与Navier-Stokes方程粘性极限之间的关系提供了新视角，揭示了粘性在解选择中的作用机制，对流体力学奇异极限问题有重要理论意义

title: Free boundary problem of low Mach number magnetohydrodynamic flows
summary:
In this paper we consider a free boundary problem of low Mach number
magnetohydrodynamic flow in spatial dimension n $\geq$ 2. A priori estimates of
the second fundamental form and various flow quantities in Sobolev norms are
obtained by adopting the geometrical point of view introduced by Christodoulou
and Lindblad [3]. Moreover, a blow up criterion is derived by using the method
of Beale, Kato and Majda [2].

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了低马赫数磁流体动力学自由边界问题，获得了二阶基本形式和流动量的Sobolev范数先验估计，并推导了爆破准则。
AI.motivation: 研究空间维度n≥2的低马赫数磁流体动力学自由边界问题，这类问题在等离子体物理和天体物理中有重要应用，涉及流体与磁场的耦合作用以及自由边界的演化。
AI.techniques: 采用Christodoulou和Lindblad引入的几何观点，运用Beale-Kato-Majda方法推导爆破准则，使用Sobolev空间估计技术分析二阶基本形式和流动量。
AI.main_theorems: 获得了二阶基本形式和各类流动量在Sobolev范数下的先验估计，推导了该自由边界问题的爆破准则，为解的存在性和正则性提供了关键分析工具。
AI.significance: 为低马赫数磁流体动力学自由边界问题提供了系统的分析框架，将Christodoulou-Lindblad的几何方法推广到磁流体情形，所得爆破准则对理解解的奇性形成机制有重要意义。

title: Fully nonlinear parabolic fixed transmission problems
summary:
We consider transmission problems for parabolic equations governed by
distinct fully nonlinear operators on each side of a time-dependent interface.
We prove that if the interface is $C^{1,\alpha}$, in the parabolic sense, then
viscosity solutions are piecewise $C^{1,\alpha}$ up to the interface. As
byproducts, we obtain a new ABP-Krylov-Tso estimate, and establish existence,
uniqueness, a comparison principle, and regularity results for the flat
interface problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了时间依赖界面上完全非线性抛物型传输问题的解在界面附近的分片C^{1,α}正则性
AI.motivation: 研究时间依赖界面上由不同完全非线性算子控制的抛物型传输问题，这类问题在相变、材料科学和自由边界问题中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用粘性解方法、新的ABP-Krylov-Tso估计、界面正则性提升技术、比较原理和平界面问题的存在唯一性证明
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：当界面是抛物意义下的C^{1,α}时，粘性解在界面附近是分片C^{1,α}的；同时获得了新的ABP-Krylov-Tso估计，建立了平界面问题的存在性、唯一性、比较原理和正则性结果
AI.significance: 为完全非线性抛物型传输问题提供了系统的正则性理论，建立了界面正则性与解正则性的联系，为自由边界问题和相变模型的研究提供了新工具

title: Concentration comparison for nonlinear diffusion on model manifolds and Pólya-Szegő inequality
summary:
We investigate the validity of the mass concentration comparison for a class
of nonlinear diffusion equations posed on Riemannian manifolds $ \mathbb{M}^n $
that are spherically symmetric, that is, model manifolds. The concentration
comparison states that the solution of a certain diffusion equation that takes
the radially decreasing (Schwarz) rearrangement $ u_0^\star $ as its initial
datum is more concentrated than the original solution starting from $u_0$. This
is known to hold in $\mathbb{R}^n$ as a consequence of the celebrated
P\'olya-Szeg\H{o} inequality, which asserts that the $ L^2 $ norm of the
gradient of a function $f$ (belonging to an appropriate Sobolev space) is
always larger than the $ L^2 $ norm of the gradient of its radially decreasing
rearrangement $f^\star$. However, if $ \mathbb{M}^n $ is a general model
manifold, it is not for granted that the P\'olya-Szeg\H{o} inequality holds; in
fact, we will provide a simple condition involving the scalar curvature of
$\mathbb{M}^n $ under which such an inequality actually fails. The main result
we prove states that, given any continuous, nondecreasing, and nontrivial
function $ \phi: [0,+\infty) \to [0,+\infty) $, the filtration equation $
\partial_t u = \Delta \phi(u) $ satisfies the concentration comparison in $
\mathbb{M}^n \times (0,+\infty) $ if and only if $ \mathbb{M}^n $ supports the
P\'olya-Szeg\H{o} inequality. In particular, the validity of such a comparison
for the heat equation is sufficient to guarantee that the same holds for all
filtration equations. Moreover, we prove that if $ \mathbb{M}^n $ supports a
centered isoperimetric inequality then the P\'olya-Szeg\H{o} inequality, and
thus the concentration comparison, holds. This allows us to include important
examples such as the hyperbolic space and the sphere.

AI.tldr: 证明了在球对称黎曼流形上，质量集中比较原理成立当且仅当Pólya-Szegő不等式成立，并建立了与等周不等式的关系。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性扩散方程在黎曼流形上的质量集中比较原理的有效性。在ℝⁿ中，该原理由Pólya-Szegő不等式保证，但在一般球对称流形上，该不等式可能不成立。论文旨在确定在何种几何条件下，质量集中比较原理对过滤方程成立。
AI.techniques: 使用球对称（模型）流形的几何分析，研究Pólya-Szegő不等式与标量曲率的关系，建立等周不等式与Pólya-Szegő不等式的联系，应用重排理论和比较原理方法。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：对于任意连续、非减、非平凡函数φ，过滤方程∂_t u = Δφ(u)在𝕄ⁿ×(0,∞)上满足质量集中比较原理当且仅当𝕄ⁿ支持Pólya-Szegő不等式。特别地，热方程的比较原理成立可保证所有过滤方程的比较原理成立。此外，如果𝕄ⁿ支持中心等周不等式，则Pólya-Szegő不等式（从而质量集中比较原理）成立。
AI.significance: 建立了黎曼几何中Pólya-Szegő不等式与非线性扩散方程比较原理的等价关系，揭示了标量曲率对重排不等式的影响，将结果推广到双曲空间和球面等重要例子，为在非欧几里得空间中的分析提供了理论基础。

title: On the asymptotic properties of solutions to a nonlinear transmission problem for a Bresse beam with thermal damping
summary:
A nonlinear transmission problem for an arch beam, which consists of two
parts with different material properties is considered. One of the parts is
subjected to thermal damping while another one is undamped. The thermal damping
affects only the shear angle and the longitudinal equation within the damped
part, which can have any positive length. We prove the well-posedness of the
system in the energy space and establish the existence of a compact global
attractor under certain conditions imposed solely on the coefficients of the
damped part. Additionally, we study singular limits of the system as the
curvature of the beam tends to zero or in case both the curvature vanishes and
the shear moduli tend to infinity. Numerical simulations are also carried out
to model these limiting behaviors.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有非线性传输特性的拱形梁系统，包含热阻尼和无阻尼两部分，证明了适定性并建立了紧全局吸引子的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究由不同材料组成的拱形梁的非线性传输问题，其中一部分受到热阻尼影响而另一部分无阻尼，热阻尼仅影响阻尼部分的剪切角和纵向方程，且阻尼部分长度可以是任意正值。
AI.techniques: 使用能量空间方法证明适定性，通过系数条件建立紧全局吸引子，研究曲率趋于零或曲率消失且剪切模量趋于无穷时的奇异极限，并进行数值模拟。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了系统在能量空间中的适定性，在仅对阻尼部分系数施加条件下建立了紧全局吸引子的存在性，研究了曲率趋于零或曲率消失且剪切模量趋于无穷时的奇异极限行为。
AI.significance: 为具有部分阻尼的非线性拱形梁系统提供了完整的数学理论框架，揭示了热阻尼对系统长期行为的影响，奇异极限研究为理解梁的几何和材料参数极限提供了理论依据。

title: Miminization of the first eigenvalue of the Dirichlet Laplacian with a small volume obstacle
summary:
We consider the well-known shape optimization problem with spectral cost:
minimizing the first eigenvalue of the Dirichlet Laplacian among all subdomains
$\Omega$ having prescribed volume and contained in a fixed box $D$;
equivalently, we look for the best way to remove a compact set (obstacle)
$K\subset\overline{D}$ of Lebesgue measure $|K|=\varepsilon$,
$0<\varepsilon<|D|$, in order to minimize the first Dirichlet eigenvalue of the
set $\Omega = D \setminus K$.
  In the small volume regime $\varepsilon\to0$, we prove that the optimal
obstacles accumulate, in a suitable sense, to points of $\partial D$ where
$|\nabla \phi_0|$ is minimal, where $\phi_0$ denotes the first eigenfunction of
the Dirichlet Laplacian on $D$. Moreover, we provide a fairly detailed
description of the convergence of the optimal eigenvalues, eigenfunctions and
free boundaries. Our results are based on sharp estimates of the optimal
eigenvalues, in terms of a suitable notion of relative capacity.

AI.tldr: 证明了在小体积极限下，Dirichlet Laplace算子第一特征值形状优化问题的最优障碍物会收敛到边界上梯度模最小的点
AI.motivation: 研究经典的谱形状优化问题：在固定盒子D中，寻找给定体积ε的最优障碍物K，使得D\K的Dirichlet Laplace算子第一特征值最小。这是谱几何和形状优化中的基本问题，关注小体积极限下的渐近行为。
AI.techniques: 基于相对容量的精确估计，建立最优特征值的尖锐估计；使用变分方法和渐近分析技术；研究自由边界的收敛性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当ε→0时，最优障碍物K*在适当意义下收敛到∂D上|∇φ₀|最小的点，其中φ₀是D上的第一特征函数；2. 提供了最优特征值、特征函数和自由边界收敛的详细描述；3. 建立了基于相对容量的最优特征值精确估计。
AI.significance: 为谱形状优化问题提供了小体积极限下的完整渐近理论，揭示了最优障碍物的几何位置与基础域特征函数梯度的深刻联系，对形状优化、谱几何和自由边界问题有重要理论意义。

title: Reconstruction in the Calderón problem on a fixed partition from finite and partial boundary data
summary:
This short note modifies a reconstruction method by the author (Comm. PDE,
45(9):1118--1133, 2020), for reconstructing piecewise constant conductivities
in the Calder\'on problem (electrical impedance tomography). In the former
paper, a layering assumption and the local Neumann-to-Dirichlet map was needed
since the piecewise constant partitioning also was assumed unknown. Here I show
how to modify the method in case the partitioning is known, for general
piecewise constant conductivities and only a finite number of partial boundary
measurements. Moreover, no lower/upper bounds on the unknown conductivity are
needed.

AI.tldr: 改进了Calderón问题中分段常数电导率的重构方法，在已知分区的情况下仅需有限边界测量且无需电导率上下界
AI.motivation: Calderón问题（电阻抗断层成像）中重构分段常数电导率的问题。作者先前的方法需要分层假设和局部Neumann-to-Dirichlet映射，因为分段常数分区未知。本文旨在改进方法，处理已知分区的情况。
AI.techniques: 修改作者先前提出的重构方法，利用已知的分区信息，仅需有限数量的部分边界测量，无需电导率上下界约束
AI.main_theorems: 提出了改进的重构方法，适用于一般分段常数电导率，仅需有限边界测量，在已知分区的情况下无需电导率上下界
AI.significance: 简化了Calderón问题中分段常数电导率的重构条件，降低了数据要求，为电阻抗断层成像的实际应用提供了更实用的数学工具

title: Self-Similar Solutions to the Hele-Shaw Problem with Surface Tension
summary:
We consider the Hele-Shaw problem with surface tension in an infinite domain.
We prove the existence of a family of self-similar solutions. At $t=0$, these
solutions have a corner of angle $\theta$ with $ 0 < |\theta - \pi| \ll 1$, and
for $t>0$, the solutions are smooth.

AI.tldr: 证明了Hele-Shaw问题在无限区域中具有表面张力时，存在一族自相似解，这些解在t=0时具有接近π的角点，而在t>0时变得光滑。
AI.motivation: 研究Hele-Shaw问题（描述粘性流体在狭窄间隙中流动的模型）在无限区域中带有表面张力的情况。该问题在界面演化中会出现奇异性，特别是角点的形成和演化，这是流体界面动力学的经典问题。
AI.techniques: 自相似解构造、复分析方法、界面演化方程的奇异性分析、表面张力正则化技术、小参数展开方法。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了存在一族自相似解，在初始时刻t=0具有角度为θ的角点（其中0<|θ-π|<<1），对于t>0解变得光滑，描述了角点如何被表面张力正则化并演化为光滑界面。
AI.significance: 为Hele-Shaw问题中界面奇异性演化提供了精确解，揭示了表面张力如何正则化角点奇异性，对理解流体界面动力学和自由边界问题的正则化机制有重要意义。

title: Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky system with sublinear and critical nonlinearities: solutions at negative energy levels and asymptotic behaviour
summary:
We consider the following Schr\"odinger-Bopp-Podolsky system with critical
and sublinear terms \begin{equation*} \begin{cases}
  - \Delta u+ u+Q(x)\phi u= \vert u\vert^4 u+ \lambda K(x)\vert u
\vert^{p-1}u&\mbox{ in }\ \mathbb{R}^3 \smallskip
  - \Delta \phi+ a^{2}\Delta^{2} \phi = 4\pi Q(x) u^{2}& \mbox{ in }\
\mathbb{R}^3. \end{cases} \end{equation*} Here $u,\phi:\mathbb
{R}^{3}\rightarrow \mathbb{R}$ are the unknowns, $Q$ and $K$ are given
functions satisfying mild assumptions, $a\geq0, \lambda>0$ are parameters and
$p\in (0,1)$.
  We first show existence of infinitely many solutions at negative energy
level, including the ground state, when the parameter $\lambda$ is small. Then
  we give general results concerning the structure of the set of solutions.
  We show also the behaviour of the solutions as the parameters $a,\lambda$
tend to zero. In particular the ground states solutions tends to a ground state
solution of the Schr\"odinger-Poisson system as $a$ tends to zero.

AI.tldr: 研究带临界和次线性项的Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统，证明了小参数下负能级无穷多解的存在性，包括基态解，并分析了参数趋于零时解的渐近行为。
AI.motivation: 研究具有临界增长和次线性项的Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统，该系统是Schrödinger-Poisson系统的推广，包含Bopp-Podolsky修正项，在量子电动力学和相对论量子力学中有应用背景。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、临界点理论、山路引理、Nehari流形技术，结合集中紧性原理处理临界指数项，分析参数极限下的渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当参数λ充分小时，系统在负能级存在无穷多解（包括基态解）；2. 给出解集结构的普适性结果；3. 证明当参数a,λ趋于零时解的渐近行为，特别是基态解收敛到Schrödinger-Poisson系统的基态解。
AI.significance: 扩展了Schrödinger-Poisson系统的理论研究，处理了带临界指数和次线性项的非线性耦合系统，为量子场论中的相关模型提供了严格的数学分析框架。
